sentences.target: Il y a une fuite sous l'évier.

translations.fr: Il y a une fuite sous l'évier.
translations.en: There’s a leak under the sink.
translations.es: Hay una fuga debajo del fregadero.
translations.de: Unter der Spüle ist ein Leck.
translations.it: C'è una perdita sotto il lavandino.
translations.pt: Há um vazamento embaixo da pia.
translations.vi: Có rò rỉ dưới bồn rửa.
translations.nl: Er is een lekkage unter de gootsteen.
translations.el: Υπάρχει διαρροή κάτω από τον νεροχύτη.
translations.nb: Det er en lekkasje under vasken.
translations.sv: Det finns en läcka under diskhon.
translations.da: Der er en lækage under vasken.
translations.ja: シンクの下に水漏れがあります。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal subject pronoun in the existential construction 'il y a'.
Clitic locative pronoun; part of the fixed expression 'il y a'.
Main verb (3rd person singular present) forming the existential 'there is/are'.
Indefinite article introducing the noun 'fuite'.
Common noun; head of the noun phrase serving as the existentially introduced entity.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article elided before a vowel; determiners the following noun.
Noun; object of the preposition 'sous'.

sentences.target: Tu vois la fuite près du radiateur.
sentences.reading: /ty vwa la fɥit pʁɛ dy ʁadjatœʁ/

translations.fr: Tu vois la fuite près du radiateur.
translations.ipa: /ty vwa la fɥit pʁɛ dy ʁadjatœʁ/
translations.en: You see the leak near the radiator.
translations.es: Ves la fuga cerca del radiador.
translations.de: Du siehst das Leck in der Nähe des Heizkörpers.
translations.it: Vedi la perdita vicino al radiatore.
translations.zh-Hans: 你看到暖气片旁边有漏水。
translations.yue: 你見到暖氣片附近有滲水。
translations.pt: Você vê o vazamento perto do radiador.
translations.he: אתה רואה את הנזילה ליד הרדיאטור.
translations.vi: Bạn thấy chỗ rò rỉ gần máy sưởi.
translations.nl: Je ziet de lekkage bij de radiator.
translations.hu: Látod a szivárgást a radiátor mellett.
translations.hi: तुम रेडिएटर के पास रिसाव देख रहे हो.
translations.el: Βλέπεις τη διαρροή κοντά στο καλοριφέρ.
translations.id: Kamu melihat kebocoran di dekat radiator.
translations.ja: ラジエーターの近くに水漏れが見えます。

tokens.explanation: Second-person singular subject pronoun.
Main verb (2nd person singular present) taking a direct object.
Definite article marking a specific referent.
Common noun; direct object of 'vois'.
Preposition 'near' that typically selects 'de' to introduce its complement.
Preposition 'de' contracted with 'le' after 'près'; introduces the complement noun.
Noun; complement of the preposition 'du'.

sentences.target: On cherche une fuite dans la salle de bains.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ʃɛʁʃ yn fɥit dɑ̃ la sal də bɛ̃/

translations.fr: On cherche une fuite dans la salle de bains.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ʃɛʁʃ yn fɥit dɑ̃ la sal də bɛ̃/
translations.en: We’re looking for a leak in the bathroom.
translations.es: Estamos buscando una fuga en el baño.
translations.de: Wir suchen nach einem Leck im Badezimmer.
translations.it: Stiamo cercando una perdita in bagno.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在浴室里找漏水。
translations.pt: Estamos procurando um vazamento no banheiro.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tìm chỗ rò rỉ trong phòng tắm.
translations.ar: نحن نبحث عن تسرّب في الحمّام.
translations.nl: We zoeken een lekkage in de badkamer.
translations.uk: Ми шукаємо протікання у ванній кімнаті.
translations.hi: हम बाथरूम में रिसाव ढूँढ रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi leter etter en lekkasje på badet.
translations.id: Kami sedang mencari kebocoran di kamar mandi.
translations.sv: Vi letar efter en läcka i badrummet.
translations.da: Vi leder efter en lækage på badeværelset.
translations.ja: 私たちは浴室で水漏れを探しています。

tokens.explanation: Generic subject pronoun, often used for 'we' in informal French.
Main verb (3rd person singular present) selecting a direct object.
Indefinite article introducing the noun 'fuite'.
Common noun; direct object of 'cherche'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article in the complex noun phrase 'la salle de bains'.
Noun; head of the compound 'salle de bains'.
Preposition linking the compound noun 'salle de bains'.
Plural noun; complement of 'de' in the fixed expression 'salle de bains'.

sentences.target: J'appelle quelqu'un pour cette fuite au plafond.
sentences.reading: /ʒapɛl kɛlkœ̃ puʁ sɛt fɥit o plafɔ̃/

translations.fr: J'appelle quelqu'un pour cette fuite au plafond.
translations.ipa: /ʒapɛl kɛlkœ̃ puʁ sɛt fɥit o plafɔ̃/
translations.en: I’m calling someone for that leak in the ceiling.
translations.es: Estoy llamando a alguien por esa fuga en el techo.
translations.de: Ich rufe wegen des Lecks an der Decke jemanden an.
translations.it: Sto chiamando qualcuno per quella perdita nel soffitto.
translations.ko: 천장의 누수 때문에 누군가에게 전화하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我正在为天花板漏水打电话找人。
translations.yue: 我而家為咗天花滲水打電話搵人。
translations.ru: Я звоню кому-нибудь из-за протечки на потолке.
translations.pt: Estou ligando para alguém por causa daquele vazamento no teto.
translations.he: אני מתקשר למישהו בגלל הנזילה בתקרה.
translations.tr: Tavandaki o sızıntı için birini arıyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi đang gọi cho ai đó về chỗ rò rỉ trên trần nhà.
translations.ar: أنا أتصل بشخص بسبب ذلك التسرّب في السقف.
translations.nl: Ik bel iemand vanwege die lekkage in het plafond.
translations.uk: Я телефоную комусь через те протікання на стелі.
translations.hu: A mennyezeten lévő szivárgás miatt felhívok valakit.
translations.hi: मैं छत में उस रिसाव के लिए किसी को फ़ोन कर रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Dzwonię do kogoś w sprawie tego przecieku w suficie.
translations.el: Παίρνω κάποιον τηλέφωνο για εκείνη τη διαρροή στο ταβάνι.
translations.nb: Jeg ringer noen på grunn av den lekkasjen i taket.
translations.id: Saya menelepon seseorang karena kebocoran di langit-langit itu.
translations.sv: Jag ringer någon för den där läckan i taket.
translations.ro: Sun pe cineva pentru acea scurgere din tavan.
translations.cs: Volám někomu kvůli tomu zatékání ze stropu.
translations.da: Jeg ringer til nogen på grund af den lækage i loftet.
translations.ja: 天井のその水漏れのことで誰かに電話しています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun elided before a vowel-initial verb.
Main verb (1st person singular present).
Indefinite pronoun functioning as the direct object of 'appelle'.
Preposition introducing a purpose/reason complement.
Demonstrative determiner specifying the noun 'fuite'.
Common noun; object within the prepositional phrase 'pour cette fuite'.
Preposition 'à' contracted with 'le', introducing the locative complement.
Noun; complement of the preposition 'au'.
